mechanism_name: Procedure finds its own fixed point
description: Operation on its own output converges to a fixed point
Choice of method/framing forces the recursive result

mechanism_name: Observer and observed cannot be separated
description: Act of investigation describes joint observer-observed system
All discriminating information extracted; further processing is artifact
Dynamics governed by attractor; escape requires external intervention

mechanism_name: Question is incoherent at this level
description: Question cannot be answered within current framework
What a thing IS is constituted by its relationships, not intrinsic essence
